---
title: "Krill Size"
subtitle: "Changes in krill size in CCE"
author: Lala Movsesian
format: html
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---




# Data Exploration
Includes tables showing sample size, cruises, jars, day vs night sample abundance, dominant species compared over the years, etc.


# Body size and MOCI
Includes body size comapred with MOCI in juveniles and adults, includes visualizations and GAMs


# Body size and other climate indices




# Decision Log

includes decisions made during data analysis and reasoning (brief reasoning for main decisions also mentioned in the respective section in between code chunks)
